title: Ocean Depths
description: Will you be able to go deep into the ocean depths? Discover new challenges in this new modpack made almost entirely of water!
body:
![Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/OCEAN_DEPTHS/BH_OCEAN_DEPTHS_Header.webp) Welcome to Ocean Depths! Our first big project, and in which we are very excited, of course, as its name suggests, the modpack is related to marine life, and we think that almost all current modpacks have the same mechanics, and very few are focused on aquatic exploration, no doubt, now you can not leave it aside... And it's much more fun! Ocean dimensions, structures, enemies, and much, much to discover... **QUESTS NOW AVAILABLE!** ### **Ready to play with your friends on the best hosting?**

I recommend **[Bisect Hosting](https://bisecthosting.com/flashh)** for playing with friends because of their high-quality, lag-free servers. You can install any CurseForge modpack or your custom mods without errors. Plus, their support is available 24/7 to help with any issues. Use my code **[to get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/flashh)** on your purchase. ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/OCEAN_DEPTHS/BH_OCEAN_DEPTHS_Description.webp) The player will be immersed in an exciting world formed mainly by 30% of land, with new and fantastic biomes, structures, enemies, and incredible places to explore. On the other hand, the main part of the modpack, the remaining 70%, consisting of water, and all that surrounds it, ocean depths, aquatic structures, marine animals, a lot of mods related to marine life, aquatic dimensions, and much more that you will have to discover on your own... - The world's generation has changed, Ocean World, help us that most of the land is made up of water! But don't worry, you can still discover a lot of new biomes in Regions Unexplored - Enter the dimension of Atlantis! Will you be able to survive! - There are many enemies waiting for you in the deep sea... Myths of The Sea, Dark Waters, Aquamirae, Aquatic Creepers, are just some of the many mods chosen... - But there are many more upgrades for the oceans, which you will have to discover, although we would also like to mention the presence of Aquaculture 2, Illager Warship or Upgrade Aquatic among others! - Ocean Depths is an ideal modpack for all types of players, and of course, it also enhances terrestrial life, incorporating Underwater Village, YUNG's, Macaw's, Alex's Mobs, Corail Tombstone and other community-loved mods. ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/OCEAN_DEPTHS/BH_OCEAN_DEPTHS_Screenshots.webp) ![Screenshots 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/w8OJFxBB/images/d3cdb6cffdd4cc1388a3748bb710b0e7b76bb82f.jpeg) ![Screenshots 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/w8OJFxBB/images/9f25d89724e258bc41b366f2b003659679da7036.jpeg) ![Screenshots 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/w8OJFxBB/images/6a830c9dc996eaf1d7e692edcb03a0aefa293970.jpeg) ![Screenshots 4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/w8OJFxBB/images/664e1a494dd77e3aa4b29496ddd9a9baad3619b3.png)
